# Etravirine 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Etravirine 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Etravirine</strong> 目前有 <strong>10 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Etravirine 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Intelence, in combination with a boosted protease inhibitor and other antiretroviral medicinal products, is indicated for the treatment of human-immunodeficiency-virus-type-1 (HIV-1) infection in...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L1</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>HIV infectious disease（100.0%）</li>
<li>simian immunodeficiency virus infection（100.0%）</li>
<li>feline acquired immunodeficiency syndrome（100.0%）</li>
<li>neurodevelopmental disorder with ataxic gait, absent speech, and decreased cortical white matter（100.0%）</li>
<li>AIDS（99.9%）</li>
<li>congenital human immunodeficiency virus（99.8%）</li>
<li>AIDS related complex（99.8%）</li>
<li>fibroma of prostate（99.7%）</li>
<li>Brenner tumor（99.7%）</li>
<li>benign reproductive system neoplasm（99.7%）</li>
<li>benign prostate phyllodes tumor（99.7%）</li>
<li>obsolete familial combined hyperlipidemia（99.6%）</li>
<li>male reproductive organ cancer（99.6%）</li>
<li>prostate cancer/brain cancer susceptibility（99.6%）</li>
<li>prostate leiomyoma（99.6%）</li>
<li>breast fibrocystic disease（99.1%）</li>
<li>apocrine adenosis of breast（98.6%）</li>
<li>blunt duct adenosis of breast（98.6%）</li>
<li>benign mammary dysplasia（98.5%）</li>
<li>prostate neoplasm（97.9%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/etravirine/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
